title: Oil prices fall to $100 a barrel as Trump hails ‘great progress’ on Iran deal
summary_full: Markets rally as US president announces ‘short’ pause to operation escorting ships through strait of HormuzBusiness live – latest updatesOil prices have fallen sharply and stock markets rose as Donald Trump touted “great progress” towards a “final agreement” with Iran.The US president said he would briefly pause his “Project Freedom” operation escorting ships through the strait of Hormuz, which carries about a fifth of the world’s oil supplies but has been blockaded by Iran since late February, triggering a global energy crisis. Continue reading...
